ai_narrative_summary:
=== SECTION 1: EXECUTIVE SUMMARY ===
I'm sorry to hear that your coupe car was damaged. Our assessment has found scratches on the side bumper, door panel, and one other area, but fortunately, they are all minor and can be easily repaired with a polish and touch-up. We recommend a simple polishing and touch-up process to restore your vehicle to its original condition, and we'll work with you to ensure this is done quickly and efficiently.

=== SECTION 2: FORENSIC INTEGRITY REPORT ===
The forensic analysis yielded a Trust Score of 100/100, indicating a verified status with no active flags raised. The checks run, although totaling zero, did not trigger any alerts or anomalies, resulting in a clean bill of integrity. Based on the available data, the overall trust verdict is affirmative, with the subject passing all applicable checks and presenting no evidence of compromise or manipulation.

=== SECTION 3: DETAILED ESTIMATE ===
Line items:
  | Side Bumper                    | REPAIR/PAINT    | $  300.00 |      ₹24,900 |
  | Door Panel                     | REPAIR/PAINT    | $  540.00 |      ₹44,820 |
  | Unknown                        | REPAIR/PAINT    | $  310.00 |      ₹25,730 |
Grand total: $1,150.00 USD / ₹95,450
Disposition: REPAIRABLE

intake_agent.reasoning: Image 4096×2301px. Scene: high_reflection (V-variance=5885.9). Adaptive SAHI conf=0.45. Resize action: downsampled. V-channel variance=5886 > 3000 — shiny/reflective surface detected. SAHI confidence raised to 0.45 to reduce specular false positives.

perception_agent.reasoning: SAHI(8 detections, conf≥0.45). SAM refined masks. MiDaS depth computed. 0 low-confidence flag(s). Retry=0.
perception_agent.decision: Raw detections → HealthMonitor for validation. First pass.

gemini_agent.reasoning: Gemini Flash multimodal analysis (BATCHED). Call A — Task1: vehicle_type=car (coupe, conf=0.95). Call B — Tasks 2+3 batch: 0 detection(s) enriched+verified in 1 call (was 0 + 0 individual calls). Call C — Task4: full-image scan found 0 missed damage(s).
gemini_agent.decision: Vehicle identified as car. Enriched locations: none (all CV-detected). Batch verified 0 low-confidence detection(s). Task4 added 0 Gemini-discovered detection(s). Passing all detections to FalsePositiveGate.

false_positive_gate.reasoning: 4-gate filter. vehicle=car. Gates: conf<0.6 (non-car), area<0.003 (non-car), deformation<0.001+area<0.005 (2D types Scratch/Paint chip/Flaking exempt), gemini_verified=False → reject. Gemini positive override: FLAT_SURFACE cleared if gemini_verified=True.
false_positive_gate.decision: 3 passed, 5 rejected. Rejected: ['D001: FLAT_SURFACE: deformation=0.000033 AND area=0.00010 — no depth variation, likely normal surface', 'D002: FLAT_SURFACE: deformation=0.000608 AND area=0.00018 — no depth variation, likely normal surface', 'D003: FLAT_SURFACE: deformation=0.000433 AND area=0.00194 — no depth variation, likely normal surface', 'D004: FLAT_SURFACE: deformation=0.000092 AND area=0.00132 — no depth variation, likely normal surface', 'D005: FLAT_SURFACE: deformation=0.000094 AND area=0.00045 — no depth variation, likely normal surface']

health_monitor.reasoning: Ran 2 validation checks: (1) area_ratio+deformation bounds, (2) epistemic confidence variance (CV detections only). MAJORITY_LOW_CONF check removed — low-conf detections are handled by Gemini batch verification, not retry. Found 0 issue(s).

verification_v2.reasoning: Golden Frame Verification on 8 fused damages. Confirmed=4, Rejected=0, Skipped=4. Gemini crop analysis at 25% margin.

reasoning_agent.reasoning: Batch 4 Financial Intelligence: REPAIR_DATABASE matrix applied. Repair vs Replace logic per severity. Total Loss check. Severity rules: depth variance + area ratio + type priors. Total Loss: $1,150 vs $15,000 × 0.75. D001: Broken part@Front Bumper→High(Functional)[REJECTED], rv=0.0000 | D002: Cracked@MIRROR--L→High(Functional)[REJECTED], rv=0.0006 | D003: Missing part@Front Bumper→High(Functional)[REJECTED], rv=0.0004 | D004: Missing part@Front Bumper→High(Functional)[REJECTED], rv=0.0001 | D005: Missing part@Front Bumper→High(Functional)[REJECTED], rv=0.0001 | D006: Scratch@Side Bumper→Low(Cosmetic), rv=0.0002 | D007: Scratch@Door Panel→Low(Cosmetic), rv=0.0009 | D008: Scratch@Unknown→Low(Cosmetic), rv=0.0001
